metodos.codigoOriginal:
If (ThisForm.OptTpRel.Value = 1) && Reduzida
	Report Form SigReFtp Preview NoConsole
Else 							 && Expandido (Grande)
	Report Form SigReFt1 Preview NoConsole
EndIf
* Fim *********************************************************************************

Select csDetalhes
Recall All
Scan
	If Seek(Str(csDetalhes.Ordems,2) + csDetalhes.Grupos, 'csSelekton', 'OrdGru')
		If Not csSelekton.lMarca
			Delete In csDetalhes
		EndIf
	EndIf
EndScan
Go Top In csSelekton
Go Top In csCabecalho
Go Top In csDetalhes
* Fim *********************************************************************************

Parameters pcProd, pdProd

=DoDefault()

Thisform.fcProd = pcProd

Select .f. as lMarca, *  ;
  From csDetalhes ;
  Into Cursor csSelekTon ReadWrite

Select csSelekton
Index On Str(Ordems,2)+Grupos Tag OrdGru
Go Top

With ThisForm
	.getCpro.value = pcProd
	.getDpro.value = pdProd

	With .GrdProc
		.RecordSource          = 'csSelekton'
		.RecordSourceType      = 1
		.Column1.ControlSource = 'csSelekton.lmarca'
		.Column2.ControlSource = 'csSelekton.Ordems'
		.Column3.ControlSource = 'csSelekton.G... [TRUNCADO]

If (ThisForm.OptTpRel.Value = 1) && Reduzida
	Report Form SigReFtp To Printer Prompt NoConsole
Else 							 && Expandido (Grande)
	Report Form SigReFt1 To Printer Prompt NoConsole
EndIf
* Fim *********************************************************************************

If (ThisForm.OptTpRel.Value = 1) && Reduzida
	Report Form SigReFtp To Printer
Else 						     && Expandido (Grande)
	Report Form SigReFt1 To Printer
EndIf
* Fim *********************************************************************************

Lparameters nColIndex

Local lcArquivo

lcArquivo = Sys(2023) + '\SigrModP.Jpg'

With ThisForm
	With ThisForm
		Clear Resources
		.ImgFigJpg.Picture = ''
		.ImgFigJpg.Visible = .f.

		* Figura no Campo Memo
		If Not Empty(csSelekTon.FigProcs) And Not IsNull(csSelekTon.FigProcs)
			If (StrToFile(csSelekTon.FigProcs, lcArquivo) > 0)
				.ImgFigJpg.Picture = (lcArquivo)
				.ImgFigJpg.Visible = .t.
			EndIf
		EndIf
	EndWith

	.Obs.Refresh
	.Refresh
EndWith
* Fim ************************************... [TRUNCADO]
Replace csSelekTon.lMarca With This.Value In csSelekTon

Replace All lMarca With .t. In csSelekTon
Go Top In csSelekTon
ThisForm.Refresh
* Fim *********************************************************************************

Replace All lMarca With .f. In csSelekTon
Go Top In csSelekTon
ThisForm.Refresh
* Fim *********************************************************************************

sqlQueries.queryOriginal: Select .f. as lMarca, *  ; From csDetalhes ; Into Cursor csSelekTon ReadWrite
